channel.title: cmake on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in cmake on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: CMake
item.description: Overview This presentation discusses CMake fundamentals and its future direction, brought into the context of Bitcoin Core. The speaker notes not to expect too many best practices, as these have been discussed before. Best practices for Bitcoin are not best practices for many other projects. The goal is to explain what CMake is and what direction it should go in the future, to help understand the full scope of what it can be used for and to show some things that can change, because best practices evolve over time.
